_meta.description: Shop inventory for Chronicles of the Verdant Crossroads. Edit values freely — never change the keys, the 'effect' type, or reorder entries, as positions map to translation strings in the language JSONs (shop.items array).

fields.id: Internal identifier for the item (do not change)
fields.nameEn: Reference name in English (informational only — displayed name comes from the language JSON)
fields.effect: What the item does. One of: 'addPotion', 'permAtk', 'permDef', 'permMaxHp'. Do not change.
fields.effectValue: Numeric value applied by the effect. Required for all effects.
fields.costs: { easy, balanced, hard } — gold cost per difficulty. Raise or lower freely.
fields.notes: Designer notes — not read by the game

effectTypes.addPotion: Adds one potion to the player's inventory. Used in combat with the Potion button. Heals potionHeal HP (defined in CONFIGS inside index.html: 15 on Easy, 18 on Normal/Hard). effectValue is ignored.
effectTypes.permAtk: Permanently increases the player's ATK by effectValue.
effectTypes.permDef: Permanently increases the player's DEF by effectValue.
effectTypes.permMaxHp: Permanently increases the player's maximum HP by effectValue, and heals the same amount immediately.

items.notes: Consumable. Each purchase adds one potion to the stack. The heal amount is set by CONFIGS.potionHeal in index.html (15 easy / 18 balanced+hard).
Permanent +2 DEF. Cheaper than the sword — DEF reduces all incoming damage.
Permanent +10 MaxHP, heals 10 HP immediately. Unique niche: raises the HP ceiling rather than restoring it. Resting restores HP; this increases how much HP you can have. Good mid-game purchase.
Permanent +3 ATK. Costs roughly 55% more than the Iron Sword for 50% more ATK — a fair late-game upgrade, not a trap.
